# Zappy — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Zappy (zappy5.com) is an innovative website-building platform led by CEO Ido, who will host a free live webinar on May 21st at 19:00. The brand is energetic, colorful, and empowering — positioning itself as a game-changer that enables anyone to build a professional website from scratch in minutes without coding knowledge. The webinar landing page should feel exciting and urgent, with a countdown timer, limited Zoom spots scarcity element, a registration form, a syllabus section, example websites gallery, and a post-registration WhatsApp group CTA. The tone is friendly, inspiring, accessible, and action-driven.

---

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Zappy
Zappy (zappy5.com) is an innovative website-building platform led by CEO Ido, who will host a free live webinar on May 21st at 19:00. The brand is energetic, colorful, and empowering — positioning itself as a game-changer that enables anyone to build a professional website from scratch in minutes without coding knowledge. The webinar landing page should feel exciting and urgent, with a countdown timer, limited Zoom spots scarcity element, a registration form, a syllabus section, example websites gallery, and a post-registration WhatsApp group CTA. The tone is friendly, inspiring, accessible, and action-driven.

## Target Audience
- בעלי עסקים, יזמים, מעצבים, סוכנויות, בוני אתרים וכל מי שרוצה להקים נוכחות דיגיטלית
- מפתחי אתרים פרילנסרים
- יזמים בחברות סטארטאפ
- בעלי סוכנויות דיגיטליות
- בעלי עסק קטן
- סוכנויות דיגיטל
- בוני אתרים

## Industry
Web Development Platform / SaaS

---

- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
